# ipmi_chassis_status (Data Source)

Read the chassis power state and fault indicators from a BMC via `ipmitool chassis status`. Connection attributes here override the provider defaults for this read; omit them to use the provider block's defaults.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cipher_suite` (Number) Override provider cipher_suite.
- `host` (String) Override provider host.
- `interface` (String) Override provider interface.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Override provider password.
- `port` (Number) Override provider port.
- `username` (String) Override provider username.

### Read-Only

- `chassis_intrusion` (Boolean) True if chassis intrusion is active.
- `power_fault` (Boolean) True if main power fault is reported.
- `power_on` (Boolean) True if system power is on.
- `power_overload` (Boolean) True if power overload condition is active.
